✦ Thousand Oaks & Surrounding Areas

Family Parties.
Done Right.

DJ + DSLR Photo Booth for birthdays, pool parties, milestones, and everything in between.

The best family parties are a little chaotic — and that's exactly the point. There are kids running around. Parents catching up. Someone jumping in the pool. Someone discovering they still know every word to a 2000s anthem. That's the party we're here for.

Build Your Vibe ✦ Book Your Date →
Festival-Level Fun Mixed ages, zero awkward pauses
The Fam Jam Booth Real DSLR · custom prints · digital gallery
Fam Jam Collective 3 DJs · rotating styles · kid-appropriate cool
"The ABBA Lift" When the whole backyard sings together

Elevated. Family-friendly. Never lame.

We're here to make your party the most fun it can be — tailored to your crowd and your style, but never at the expense of the vibe. From parents who know how to have a good time.

What We Are ✓

  • DJ sets built for mixed-age crowds
  • Flexible timelines, any venue
  • Kid-appropriate cool
  • Pro gear, tight execution

What We're Not ✕

  • Scripted wedding intros
  • Corny crowd games
  • Ballroom energy
  • Overproduced MC hype
Two Vendors. One Booking.

One Setup Plan.

A DJ and a DSLR Photo Booth, booked together — so your party has music that moves people and prints they actually walk away with. Three DJs in rotation. Real camera. Real lighting. Real prints.

🎛️
$500
DJ Only
3 hours. Your kids will be on the floor. So will their parents.
  • Reads the room and adjusts on the fly
  • Curated for your specific crowd
  • Kid-appropriate clean edits
  • Request-driven, reads the room
📸
$600
Photo Booth Only
3 hours. Walk away with actual prints, not just a shared album link.
  • Real DSLR camera + flattering lighting
  • Custom theme-matched template
  • Onsite attendant
  • Digital gallery with hi-res images
🎛️📸
$800
DJ + Photo Booth Bundle
3 hours. One booking, two vendors, zero day-of chaos.
  • Live DJ set, curated for your crowd
  • DSLR Photo Booth with attendant
  • Custom print templates per event
  • Digital gallery included
Add-On

Party Photos & Social Reel

We capture photos and short video clips throughout the event and cut them into a social media reel. Not a full event photographer — this is us documenting the vibe as it happens.

$200add to any package
Check Availability →
Meet the Crew

Fam Jam Collective

Three DJs. Rotating styles. One vibe tailored to your crowd (kid-appropriate cool).

We're three parents of kids under 5 who all met at Lightning in a Bottle music festival. Since then, we've spent our weekends hosting family-friendly parties in backyards and DJing in living rooms — keeping the good times going while still being home for bedtime. We love music, we love a good party, and we've gotten very good at reading a room that has both a grandma and a toddler in it.

King Daddy
Disco
LEGENDARY
Disco HouseThrowbackPeak Energy

Kid-Friendly ★★★★☆
  • Disco-house edits
  • Golden hour lift-offs
  • Rapid fire request transitions

Photo Booth

The Fam Jam Booth

Not just silly photos.

This is how your family actually gets a real photo together. We bring a DSLR, flattering lighting, and custom print templates — so people walk away with something worth keeping, not just a shared album link nobody opens.

The average Fam Jam event generates 400+ digital images — candid moments, group shots, and the kind of photos you don't usually get at a party.

  • Crisp 2x6 or 4x6 prints on the spot
  • Custom theme-matched print design
  • Onsite attendant the whole time
  • 400+ high-res digital images per event

People actually keep these prints.

✦ Add-On — $200

Party Photos & Social Reel

We'll capture photos and short video clips throughout the event — enough to cut together a social media reel. Not a full event photographer, just us documenting the vibe as it happens.

2×6 Print
4×6 Print
Custom Theme
Digital Gallery
